data.name: Brothel Master
data.detailed_description:
Brothel Master

Take control of a failing brothel and restore its reputation through smart management, strategic upgrades, and tight control over staff and clients. Brothel Master is a full 3D, adult-oriented tycoon game about power, profit, and temptation—brought to life with high-quality visuals and detailed animations.

You inherit a once-famous establishment that has fallen into decay. Crumbling rooms, dissatisfied clients, and rising expenses threaten its survival. To succeed, you must rebuild the business from the ground up and shape it into a profitable, high-end operation.

A Fully 3D Adult Experience

Explore your brothel in full 3D, complete with dynamic lighting, detailed environments, and smooth character animations. Every room, upgrade, and interaction is visually represented, creating an immersive atmosphere designed for a mature audience.

Restore, Upgrade, Expand

Repair damaged areas, unlock new floors, and upgrade specialized rooms such as private rooms, lounges, bars, and entertainment areas. Each upgrade improves efficiency, visual appeal, and client satisfaction, directly impacting revenue and reputation.

Manage and Customize Your Workforce

Hire workers with unique traits and potential. Train them to improve their performance, manage their wages and schedules, and customize their appearance, including outfits and hairstyles. Keeping staff productive and motivated is essential to maintaining a successful operation.

Control Clients and Reputation

Clients are the lifeblood of your business—but not all are welcome. Keep high-value customers satisfied, deal with disruptive behavior, and protect your reputation. Your choices determine the type of clientele you attract and the level of profit you can achieve.

A Tycoon Game for Adults

This is a management game where every decision matters. Balance income and expenses, plan expansions carefully, and adapt to new challenges as your brothel grows. Push too hard and risk collapse, or play it smart and build a thriving empire.

Features

  • Full 3D adult-themed management and tycoon gameplay

  • High-quality graphics, lighting, and character animations

  • Brothel restoration with multi-level room upgrades

  • Worker hiring, training, customization, and wage management

  • Client satisfaction, discipline, and reputation systems

  • Mature atmosphere focused on strategy, control, and profit

Brothel Master delivers a visually rich, adult management experience where success is earned through careful planning and decisive control. How far you take it is up to you.

data.short_description: A fallen brothel. A city full of clients. Hire, train, customize, and manage your workers while upgrading rooms and maximizing profits in this adult-focused management and tycoon experience.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: I7 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2060 or equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: I7 or Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 3060 or Higher
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
